title: Eva Remake Awards
wikitext:
[]: Eva Remake= Awards             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Feb 26, 2008 10:41 pm Just thought people would like to know. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2008-02-26/eva-1.0-wins-tokyo-anime-fair-animation-of-the-year Now if only Region 01 distribution would happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Feb 26, 2008 10:43 pm Haha, sweet.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Feb 26, 2008 11:43 pm I won!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 27, 2008 6:25 am I wonder how long it takes for GATSU come screaming in about how Anno is hack and everything sucks (unless it's made by Satoshi Kon) ANN definetly have their share of village idiots. These awards seem like political crap to me. I can only speak for the Gainax/Khara shows though since I haven't seen the others. Hideaki Anno is a terrible director, and he wasn't even the Director for Evangelion 1.0 according to ANN credits, it was Kazuya Tsurumaki, so letting Evangelion win is just for "anime politics" I would suspect. I haven't seen Eva 1.0 yet though for myself (I'm just very familiar with Anno and Tsurumaki's styles...btw I'm not implying that they are similar) so I might change my mind when I do. About character designer, that also looks like a political award to me. I am not sure exactly what Atsushi Nishigori did and didn't do for Gurren-Lagann, and I acknowledge that Yoko is an excellent character design, but that's it. She's only one person. Everyone else in Gurren-Lagann looks like characters from Samurai Jack (or Dead Leaves). Anyone who thinks that's high quality character art is an idiot.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Feb 27, 2008 6:58 am ANN - the right (wrong) wing of animé.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Feb 27, 2008 7:00 am Wow, I'm not that surprised, but I'm still slack-jawed. I knew Anno would get something good! All that work really paid off!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 27, 2008 7:15 am AchtungAffen wrote: ANN - the right (wrong) wing of animé.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Feb 27, 2008 9:45 am My post wasn't just expressing an impression on that post but on certain politics ANN chose to have.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 27, 2008 12:00 pm AchtungAffen wrote: My post wasn't just expressing an impression on that post but on certain politics ANN chose to have.
